scope: Navigation reports basics draft batch for Sea Speak Linguist review. Do not merge into starter.json before Director-Engineer acceptance, validator gate, QA regression, and integration.

items.source_text: Позиция
items.target_text: position

qa_notes.linguist_note: Keep position strict as current vessel position, not destination or waypoint.

items.source_text: Курс по компасу / heading
items.target_text: heading

qa_notes.linguist_note: Heading, course, and bearing are intentionally separated.

items.source_text: Курс / course
items.target_text: course

qa_notes.linguist_note: Route is ordinary voyage planning language; draft rejects it for this report term.

items.source_text: Пеленг
items.target_text: bearing

qa_notes.linguist_note: Bearing is not a free synonym for heading or course.

items.source_text: Скорость
items.target_text: speed

qa_notes.linguist_note: Speed is the quantity, not the unit knots.

items.source_text: Расстояние
items.target_text: distance

qa_notes.linguist_note: Range may be plausible in some navigation contexts, but Batch 003 keeps distance strict; range stays wrong.

items.source_text: Расчётное время прибытия
items.target_text: ETA

qa_notes.linguist_note: Explicit e t a variant allows dotted acronym E.T.A. to pass after punctuation normalization.

items.source_text: Контрольная точка доклада
items.target_text: reporting point

qa_notes.linguist_note: Waypoint is related but rejected for this reporting-point drill.

items.source_text: Моя позиция
items.target_text: my position

qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed item-local variant: position without my is acceptable here. Destination/waypoint remain wrong.

items.source_text: Мой heading
items.target_text: my heading

qa_notes.linguist_note: Heading is kept distinct from course and bearing.

items.source_text: Мой course
items.target_text: my course

qa_notes.linguist_note: Course and route are not collapsed in this draft.

items.source_text: Скорость пять узлов
items.target_text: speed five knots

qa_notes.linguist_note: Kts variants follow starter speed policy. Distance units must stay wrong.

items.source_text: ETA один четыре ноль ноль UTC
items.target_text: ETA one four zero zero UTC
accepted_answers: eta one four zero zero utc
eta one four zero zero zulu

should_accept: ETA one four zero zero UTC
should_reject: eta one five zero zero utc
dangerous_minimal_pairs: 1400 UTC / 1400Z / one four zero zero UTC
qa_notes.linguist_note: UTC/Zulu/Z accepted item-locally. Local time remains wrong.

items.source_text: На траверзе контрольной точки
items.target_text: abeam reporting point

qa_notes.linguist_note: Waypoint remains rejected for this reporting-point expression.

items.source_text: Пеленг ноль девять ноль
items.target_text: bearing zero nine zero

qa_notes.linguist_note: Bearing is distinct from heading/course. Three-digit form must remain protected.

items.source_text: Course ноль девять ноль
items.target_text: course zero nine zero

qa_notes.linguist_note: Short course frame keeps course distinct from heading and bearing.

items.source_text: Дистанция две морские мили
items.target_text: distance two nautical miles

qa_notes.linguist_note: Plain miles is rejected; draft trains nautical miles explicitly.

items.source_text: Дистанция два кабельтова
items.target_text: distance two cables

qa_notes.linguist_note: Cables are kept distinct from nautical miles and knots.

items.source_text: Повторите позицию для подтверждения
items.target_text: read back position

dangerous_minimal_pairs: say again position / read back position
qa_notes.linguist_note: Read back is confirmation; say again asks sender to repeat.

items.source_text: Повторите позицию
items.target_text: say again position

dangerous_minimal_pairs: say again position / read back position
qa_notes.linguist_note: Repeat remains wrong under Batch 001 procedure policy.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + distance + direction + reference
examples: My position is two nautical miles north of the marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + direction + reporting point
examples: My position is east of reporting point Alpha.
I am passing reporting point Alpha.
I am abeam reporting point Bravo.
My heading is zero nine zero degrees.
My course is zero nine zero degrees.
Bearing to marina is two seven zero degrees.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My course is + course + speed + speed value
examples: My course is zero nine zero, speed five knots.
My speed is six knots.
Distance is three nautical miles to the marina.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Distance is + decimal distance + unit + reference
examples: Distance is one decimal five nautical miles to the reporting point.
My ETA is one four zero zero UTC.
ETA update: one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: ETA at + reporting point + is + time + UTC
examples: ETA at reporting point Alpha is one four three zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I will report at + reporting point
examples: I will report at reporting point Alpha.
Read back my position.
Say again your position.
Correction, heading zero eight zero.
Correction, ETA one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is on the + side + side of the channel
examples: My position is on the port side of the channel.

grammar_patterns.pattern: My position is + decimal distance + direction + reporting point
examples: My position is one decimal five nautical miles west of reporting point Bravo.
Read back course zero nine zero and speed five knots.
Read back ETA one four zero zero UTC and position.
Correction, position two cables north of the marina.
Correction, course zero nine zero, speed five knots.
ETA update: one five zero zero UTC, speed five knots.
Report: position reporting point Alpha, course zero nine zero, speed five knots.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Heading, course, and bearing are related navigation terms but not interchangeable.

phrase_nav_position_east_reporting_point: position east of reporting point alpha
destination east of reporting point alpha

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Current position, destination, waypoint, and reporting point carry different navigation meanings.
ETA digits must not fuzz-match or be semantically substituted.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: 1400 UTC / 1400Z / one four zero zero UTC

expr_nav_eta_1400_utc_001: ETA one four zero zero UTC
phrase_nav_eta_1400_001: My ETA is one four zero zero UTC
phrase_nav_read_back_eta_position_001: read back ETA 1400 UTC and position
read back ETA 1400 local and position

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: UTC/Zulu/Z variants are item-local accepted forms; local time remains wrong.

phrase_nav_read_back_course_speed_001: read back course 090 and speed five knots
read back course 90 and speed five knots

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Three-digit radio heading/course/bearing form must stay protected; bare 090 is heading-local and must not validate course reports.
Speed units and distance units must not substitute for each other.

phrase_nav_distance_decimal_one_five_001: distance is one decimal five nautical miles to the reporting point
phrase_nav_position_west_point_distance_: position is one decimal five nautical miles west of reporting point bravo

phrase_nav_distance_decimal_one_five_001: distance is one point five nautical miles to the reporting point
distance is one dot five nautical miles to the reporting point
phrase_nav_position_west_point_distance_: position is one point five nautical miles west of reporting point bravo

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Batch 001 strictness keeps decimal as the trained radio form.

phrase_nav_position_north_marina_001: position is two nautical miles north of the marina
phrase_nav_position_south_breakwater_001: position is one cable south of the breakwater
phrase_nav_position_east_reporting_point: position east of reporting point alpha

phrase_nav_position_north_marina_001: position is two nautical miles south of the marina
phrase_nav_position_south_breakwater_001: position is one cable north of the breakwater
phrase_nav_position_east_reporting_point: position west of reporting point alpha
phrase_nav_position_west_point_distance_: position is one decimal five nautical miles east of reporting point bravo

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Cardinal directions are operationally different and must not fuzz-match.

phrase_nav_position_port_side_channel_00: position port side of the channel
phrase_nav_position_starboard_side_chann: position starboard side of the channel

phrase_nav_position_port_side_channel_00: position starboard side of the channel
position left side of the channel
phrase_nav_position_starboard_side_chann: position port side of the channel

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Port/starboard remain protected inside navigation position reports.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.pair: say again position / read back position
dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Read back confirms received information; say again asks for retransmission.

producer_notes.note: Reviewed item-local variants: bare 090 is rejected for course reports, UTC/Zulu/Z variants are accepted for ETA reports, kts is accepted for knots, position without my is accepted in position items, compact report forms are accepted only when the report meaning stays exact, and readback/read back spellings are accepted for read-back items.

Draft rejects route for course, direction for heading/bearing, range for distance, waypoint for reporting point, local time for UTC/Zulu ETA, point/dot for decimal, and plain miles for nautical miles.
Protect numeric tokens and units: 090/90, 080/80, 1400/1500, 1430/1400, knots/nautical miles/cables, decimal/point/dot, north/south/east/west, port/starboard.
No out-of-scope traffic, emergency, or chained-voyage material is included.
